mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, degree, graduation_date, clazz_id, violation_count, violation_score, create_time, update_time from student where id = #{id}

select (case when degree = 1 then '初中' when degree = 2 then '高中' when degree = 3 then '大专' when degree = 4 then '本科' when degree = 5 then '硕士' when degree = 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree
